title: Bridge registered: Marulan Creek Bridge
detail: Initial registration of Marulan Creek Bridge on the Hume Highway (A31). Structure built 1978. Concrete beam type. Condition assessed as GOOD at commissioning.

title: Routine inspection completed — rating 8
detail: Annual routine inspection completed by Aurecon Group. Overall condition rating 8 (GOOD). No critical defects found. Minor deck joint maintenance recommended.

title: Condition rating updated: 7 → 8
detail: Condition rating revised upward following completion of deck joint replacement works. Structure performing well for its age.

title: Bridge registered: Goulburn River Bridge
detail: Initial registration of Goulburn River Bridge on the Hume Highway (A31). Box girder concrete structure. Opened 1965.

title: Mass restriction applied — 42.5t B-Double
detail: Mass restriction applied following principal inspection findings. Reinforcement corrosion and deck delamination identified on Span 2. B-Double vehicles restricted to 42.5t GML.

title: Routine inspection completed — rating 6
detail: Inspection by GHD Engineering. Rating 6 (FAIR). Transverse deck cracking with corrosion evidence. Scour risk elevated at 2 of 5 piers 555dcdca-8614-56c7-9d18-ab05fa68618d floods. Mass restriction maintained.

title: Defect raised: Transverse cracking with delamination — HIGH
detail: High severity structural defect raised on Span 2 deck slab. Transverse cracking with concrete delamination across full width. Reinforcement corrosion evident on soffit. Repair estimate $85K.

title: Bridge registered: Jugiong Creek Bridge
detail: 1952 reinforced concrete arch bridge on the Hume Highway. Narrow cross-section 7.5m. Approaching end of design life.

title: Height restriction applied — 4.2m clearance
detail: Height restriction applied after concrete soffit degradation detected on arch span. Clear headroom reduced to 4.2m from original 4.8m. Signage installed on both approaches.

title: Principal inspection completed — rating 4 (POOR)
detail: Principal inspection by Dr. K. Patel. Rating 4 (POOR). Arch ring has longitudinal cracking. Two abutment cracks assessed as critical. Scour at arch foundations significant. Interim weight restriction applied.

title: Defect raised: Critical arch ring cracking — CRITICAL
detail: Two abutment cracks assessed as critical. Arch ring has longitudinal cracking that may indicate loss of structural integrity. Emergency assessment underway.

title: Bridge registered: Clarence River Bridge
detail: Major 8-span steel truss bridge on the Pacific Highway. Constructed 1990 as part of highway upgrade. High traffic coastal route.

title: Routine inspection completed — rating 9 (VERY GOOD)
detail: Annual inspection by WSP Australia. Excellent condition for a 34-year-old structure. No defects found. Paintwork in excellent condition. Next inspection due May 2026.

title: Bridge registered: Manning River Bridge
detail: 4-span concrete beam bridge on the Pacific Highway. Opened 1972. Mid-Coast region. High flood exposure.

title: Deck resurfacing works completed 2023
detail: Full deck resurfacing completed. New wearing course applied. Bearing inspection completed — replacement required within 3 years. Condition improved.

title: Bridge registered: Katherine River Bridge
detail: 6-span steel deck girder bridge on Stuart Highway. Constructed 1980. Critical wet season flooding risk in NT.

title: Mass restriction applied — flooding risk
detail: Mass restriction applied following wet season flooding assessment. Scour protection required at 3 piers. Temporary weight limit while scour works are designed and constructed.

title: Routine inspection completed — rating 6 (FAIR)
detail: NT DOI inspection. Rating 6 (FAIR). Scour damage at 3 piers. Corrosion on steel deck elements. Critical wet season flooding risk identified. Mass restriction maintained.

title: Bridge registered: Campaspe River Bridge
detail: 1948 concrete beam bridge. Central Victoria. Approaching critical structural condition.

title: BRIDGE CLOSED — critical structural failure risk
detail: Emergency closure of Campaspe River Bridge. Condition rating 2 (CRITICAL). Risk of structural failure under load. Emergency strengthening works underway. All traffic diverted via Epsom Road.

title: Emergency inspection — rating 2 (CRITICAL)
detail: Emergency inspection. Rating 2 (CRITICAL). Extensive spalling of concrete beams. Multiple flexural cracks. Reinforcement exposed and heavily corroded. Immediate closure recommended.

title: Mass restriction — Loddon River Bridge flood damage
detail: Mass restriction applied following 2024 February flooding. Scour damage at all 4 piers. Engineering assessment found 20% reduction in load capacity pending repair works.

title: Bridge registered: Flinders River Bridge
detail: 10-span deck truss steel bridge on Flinders Highway. Key heavy vehicle route for North Queensland beef and mineral transport. Constructed 1985.

title: Routine inspection — rating 8 (GOOD)
detail: QLD TMR inspection. Rating 8 (GOOD). Paintwork showing minor deterioration on lower chord members. Recommended spot painting within 2 years. Structure sound.

title: Bridge registered: Hawkesbury River Bridge
detail: 7-span concrete girder bridge on Pacific Motorway. Pacific Highway upgrade 2005. 4-lane strategic heavy freight corridor.

title: Routine inspection — rating 9 (VERY GOOD)
detail: TfNSW inspection. Rating 9 (VERY GOOD). Modern structure in excellent condition. No defects. Anti-carbonation coating in excellent condition. Next inspection 2026.

title: Bridge registered: Nean Creek Bridge
detail: 1940 timber bridge on New England Highway. Uralla Shire. Approaching end of design life at 84 years.

title: Mass restriction — timber bridge load capacity
detail: Mass restriction applied. Timber bridge at end of design life. Gross vehicle mass limited to 16t. Single lane passage required with traffic control. Replacement programmed for 2025-26.

title: Principal inspection — rating 3 (POOR)
detail: Principal inspection. Rating 3 (POOR). Timber pile decay at 60% of piles. Deck planking split and unsafe. Steel bearing plates corroded. Replacement required within 2 years.

title: Temporary restriction — flood event Hume Highway
detail: Temporary load restriction applied during Goulburn flood event. All heavy vehicles restricted to 10t until floodwaters recede and post-flood inspection completed.
